_meta.description: Reasonix 渗透工作台技能索引 — 供 Reasonix 按需加载，避免全量读取

main_skills.name: 渗透测试总指挥
main_skills.description: 渗透测试总指挥 - 智能调度 reasonix_sentou 项目内所有工具和技能，根据目标情况自动选择最优方案。支持：信息收集/端口扫描/漏洞检测/弱口令/内网渗透/报告生成

main_skills.name: 端口扫描与资产探测
main_skills.description: 端口扫描与资产探测 - 使用 fscan 对内网/外网目标进行存活探测、端口扫描和服务识别

main_skills.name: Web 漏洞检测与 POC 扫描
main_skills.description: Web 漏洞检测与 POC 扫描 - 对 Web 服务进行漏洞扫描和 POC 检测

main_skills.name: 弱口令爆破
main_skills.description: 弱口令爆破 - 使用 fscan 对常见服务进行弱口令检测（SSH/RDP/MySQL/Redis 等）

main_skills.name: 信息收集
main_skills.description: 信息收集 - 目标资产发现、子域名枚举、端口开放探测等侦查手段

main_skills.name: 报告生成 + 自动修复
main_skills.description: 报告生成 + 自动修复 PR — 将渗透发现分类/去重/按CVSS排序，生成结构化报告（HTML/Word/JSON），可选自动生成修复代码并开GitHub PR（CypherFix模式）

main_skills.name: 漏洞专项检测入口
main_skills.description: 漏洞专项检测入口 - 涵盖 SQLi/XSS/SSRF/IDOR/命令注入/反序列化等 52 个漏洞方向，提供检测流程、Payload、绕过技巧

vuln_skills.name: SQL Injection
vuln_skills.description: SQL injection playbook. Use when input reaches SQL queries, authentication logic, sorting, filtering, reporting, or DB-specific blind and out-of-band execution paths.

vuln_skills.name: OS Command Injection
vuln_skills.description: Command injection playbook. Use when user input may reach shell commands, process execution, converters, import pipelines, or blind out-of-band command sinks.

vuln_skills.name: Server-Side Template Injection
vuln_skills.description: SSTI playbook. Use when template expressions, server-side rendering, preview features, or templating engines may evaluate attacker-controlled content.

vuln_skills.name: Expression Language Injection
vuln_skills.description: Expression Language injection playbook. Use when Java EL, SpEL, OGNL, or MVEL expressions may evaluate attacker-controlled input in Spring, Struts2, Confluence, or similar frameworks.

vuln_skills.name: JNDI Injection
vuln_skills.description: JNDI injection playbook. Use when Java applications perform JNDI lookups with attacker-controlled names, especially via Log4j2, Spring, or any code path reaching InitialContext.lookup().

vuln_skills.name: CRLF Injection
vuln_skills.description: CRLF injection playbook. Use when user input reaches HTTP response headers, Location redirects, Set-Cookie values, or log files where carriage-return/line-feed characters can split or inject content.

vuln_skills.name: Email Header Injection
vuln_skills.description: Email header injection and spoofing playbook. Use when testing contact forms, email APIs, password reset flows, or any feature that constructs SMTP messages with user-controlled fields. Covers CRLF injection in headers, SPF/DKIM/DMARC bypass, and phishing amplification.

vuln_skills.name: XSLT Injection
vuln_skills.description: XSLT injection testing: processor fingerprinting, XXE and document() SSRF, EXSLT write primitives, PHP/Java/.NET extension RCE surfaces. Use when user-controlled XSLT/stylesheet input or transform endpoints are in scope.

vuln_skills.name: Injection Testing Router
vuln_skills.description: Entry P1 category router for injection testing. Use when routing between XSS, SQLi, SSRF, XXE, SSTI, command injection, and NoSQL injection workflows based on how attacker-controlled input is consumed.

vuln_skills.name: Authentication & Authorization Router
vuln_skills.description: Entry P1 category router for authentication and authorization. Use when testing login flows, sessions, object authorization, JWT, OAuth, CORS, CSRF, and enterprise SSO weaknesses before any deeper auth topic skill.

vuln_skills.name: Authentication Bypass
vuln_skills.description: Authentication bypass testing playbook. Use when assessing login flows, password reset logic, account recovery, MFA bypass, token predictability, brute-force resistance, and session boundary flaws.

vuln_skills.name: JWT & OAuth Token Attacks
vuln_skills.description: JWT and OAuth token attack playbook. Use when validating token trust, signing algorithms, key handling, claim abuse, bearer flows, and OAuth account-binding weaknesses.

vuln_skills.name: JWT Privilege Escalation
vuln_skills.description: JWT-based privilege escalation playbook. Use when JWT tokens are present and role-based access control is suspected. Covers horizontal/vertical escalation, role confusion, and cross-tenant access via token manipulation.

vuln_skills.name: API Auth & JWT Abuse
vuln_skills.description: API authentication and JWT abuse playbook. Use when testing bearer tokens, API keys, claim trust, header spoofing, rate limits, and API auth boundary weaknesses.

vuln_skills.name: API Authorization & BOLA
vuln_skills.description: API authorization and BOLA testing playbook. Use when APIs expose object identifiers, nested resources, hidden writable fields, or weak function-level authorization.

vuln_skills.name: IDOR / Broken Object Authorization
vuln_skills.description: IDOR and broken object authorization testing playbook. Use when requests expose object identifiers, tenant boundaries, writable fields, or missing object-level authorization checks.

vuln_skills.name: OAuth & OIDC Misconfiguration
vuln_skills.description: OAuth and OIDC misconfiguration testing playbook. Use when reviewing redirect URI handling, state and nonce validation, PKCE, token audience, callback binding, and identity-provider trust flaws.

vuln_skills.name: SAML SSO Assertion Attacks
vuln_skills.description: SAML SSO assertion attack playbook. Use when testing signature validation, assertion wrapping, audience restrictions, ACS handling, XML trust boundaries, and enterprise SSO flaws.

vuln_skills.name: PHP Type Juggling
vuln_skills.description: PHP type juggling and weak comparison (==) bypass. Use when authentication, HMAC/signature checks, or token validation uses loose equality, numeric coercion, or hash comparisons without strict types.

vuln_skills.name: AI-Assisted Front-End Code Audit
vuln_skills.description: AI-assisted front-end code audit playbook. Use when analyzing JavaScript bundles, Webpack source maps, API clients, or front-end code for vulnerabilities. Designed for DeepSeek-Reasonix prefix-cache optimization.

vuln_skills.name: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS)
vuln_skills.description: XSS playbook. Use when user-controlled content reaches HTML, attributes, JavaScript, DOM sinks, uploads, or multi-context rendering paths.

vuln_skills.name: XSS Scanning (Dalfox)
vuln_skills.description: Dalfox XSS scanner. Use when target has input parameters and nuclei XSS templates are too generic. Dalfox specializes in parameter analysis, DOM XSS, and WAF bypass.

vuln_skills.name: Frontend JS Reverse & Encryption Bypass (SpiderX)
vuln_skills.description: SpiderX frontend JS reverse engineering and encryption bypass. Use when target web app uses client-side encryption (AES/RSA/SM4) for request parameters and you need to auto-decrypt to send modified payloads.

vuln_skills.name: CSRF
vuln_skills.description: CSRF testing playbook. Use when reviewing state-changing web flows, anti-CSRF defenses, SameSite behavior, JSON CSRF, login CSRF, and OAuth state handling.

vuln_skills.name: Clickjacking
vuln_skills.description: Clickjacking playbook. Use when testing whether target pages can be framed, whether X-Frame-Options or CSP frame-ancestors are properly configured, and whether UI redress attacks can trigger sensitive actions.

vuln_skills.name: CORS Misconfiguration
vuln_skills.description: CORS misconfiguration testing playbook. Use when analyzing cross-origin trust, credentialed browser reads, origin reflection, preflight policy bugs, and browser-based access to authenticated APIs.

vuln_skills.name: CSP Bypass (Advanced)
vuln_skills.description: Advanced Content Security Policy bypass techniques. Use when XSS or data exfiltration is blocked by CSP and you need to find policy weaknesses, trusted endpoint abuse, nonce leakage, or exfiltration channels that CSP cannot block.

vuln_skills.name: Dangling Markup Injection
vuln_skills.description: Dangling markup injection playbook. Use when HTML injection is possible but JavaScript execution is blocked (CSP, sanitizer strips event handlers, WAF blocks script tags) — exfiltrate CSRF tokens, session data, and page content by injecting unclosed HTML tags.

vuln_skills.name: Open Redirect
vuln_skills.description: Open redirect playbook. Use when URL parameters, form actions, or JavaScript sinks control navigation targets and may redirect users to attacker-controlled destinations.

vuln_skills.name: Web Cache Deception
vuln_skills.description: Web cache deception and poisoning playbook. Use when CDN, reverse proxy, or application caching may serve sensitive authenticated content to other users due to path confusion or cache key manipulation.

vuln_skills.name: Race Condition
vuln_skills.description: Race condition and TOCTOU testing for web apps. Use when testing one-time operations, concurrent HTTP abuse, rate-limit bypass, Turbo Intruder gates, HTTP/2 single-packet attacks, and CWE-362-style synchronization gaps.

vuln_skills.name: Business Logic Router
vuln_skills.description: Entry P1 category router for business logic testing. Use when workflow abuse, race conditions, pricing flaws, or multi-step state attacks matter more than parser-level input injection.

vuln_skills.name: Business Logic Vulnerabilities
vuln_skills.description: Business logic vulnerability playbook. Use when reasoning about workflows, race conditions, price manipulation, coupon abuse, state machines, and multi-step authorization gaps.

vuln_skills.name: File Access Router
vuln_skills.description: Entry P1 category router for file access and upload workflows. Use when testing download endpoints, file paths, local file inclusion, upload flows, preview pipelines, archive extraction, or storage and sharing boundaries.

vuln_skills.name: XML External Entity (XXE)
vuln_skills.description: XXE playbook. Use when XML, SVG, OOXML, SOAP, or parser-driven imports may resolve external entities, files, or internal network resources.

vuln_skills.name: Insecure Source Code Management
vuln_skills.description: Source control and artifact exposure (.git, .svn, .hg, backups, .env). Use when recon finds VCS paths, 403 on hidden dirs, or backup/config leaks during authorized testing.

vuln_skills.name: API Security Router
vuln_skills.description: Entry P1 category router for API security. Use when choosing between API recon, authorization, token abuse, and hidden-parameter workflows before any deeper API topic skill.

vuln_skills.name: API Recon & Docs
vuln_skills.description: API reconnaissance and documentation review playbook. Use when discovering endpoints, schemas, versions, OpenAPI specs, hidden docs, and surface area for API testing.

vuln_skills.name: GraphQL & Hidden Parameters
vuln_skills.description: GraphQL and hidden parameter testing playbook. Use when exploring introspection, batching, undocumented fields, hidden parameters, schema abuse, and GraphQL authorization gaps.

vuln_skills.name: HTTP/2 Specific Attacks
vuln_skills.description: HTTP/2 protocol-specific attack playbook. Use when the target supports HTTP/2 and you need to exploit binary framing, HPACK compression, h2c upgrade smuggling, pseudo-header injection, stream multiplexing abuse, or H2→H1 downgrade translation flaws.

vuln_skills.name: HTTP Request Smuggling
vuln_skills.description: HTTP request smuggling and desynchronization testing. Use when front proxies, CDNs, or load balancers disagree with the origin on message framing (Content-Length vs Transfer-Encoding), on HTTP/2→HTTP/1 translation, or when exploring client-side desync via browser fetch pipelines.

vuln_skills.name: HTTP Parameter Pollution (HPP)
vuln_skills.description: HTTP Parameter Pollution (HPP): duplicate query/body keys parsed differently by servers, proxies, WAFs, and app frameworks. Use when filters and application layers disagree on which value wins.

vuln_skills.name: HTTP Host Header Attacks
vuln_skills.description: HTTP Host header injection and routing abuse playbook. Use when the application trusts the Host header for generating URLs, routing requests, or access control — enabling password reset poisoning, web cache poisoning, SSRF via routing, and virtual host bypass.

vuln_skills.name: WebSocket Security
vuln_skills.description: WebSocket handshake, CSWSH, tooling (wsrepl, ws-harness, Burp), and common flaws. Use when apps use real-time channels, chat, notifications, or WS-backed APIs.

vuln_skills.name: Insecure Deserialization
vuln_skills.description: Insecure deserialization playbook. Use when Java, PHP, or Python applications deserialize untrusted data via ObjectInputStream, unserialize, pickle, or similar mechanisms that may lead to RCE, file access, or privilege escalation.

vuln_skills.name: JNDI Injection & Deserialization (JYso)
vuln_skills.description: JYso JNDI injection + deserialization + RCE tool. Use instead of legacy JNDI-Injection-Exploit and ysoserial. Supports echo response, memory shell injection, and multiple gadget chains in a single tool.

vuln_skills.name: Java Memory Shell Injection (MemShellParty)
vuln_skills.description: Java memory shell injection via MemShellParty. Use when target is a Java web app (Tomcat, Spring Boot, Jetty, WebLogic, etc.) and you need persistent access without leaving disk artifacts.

vuln_skills.name: Prototype Pollution
vuln_skills.description: Prototype pollution testing for JavaScript stacks. Use when user input is merged into objects (query parsers, JSON bodies, deep assign), when configuring libraries via untrusted keys, or when hunting RCE gadgets via polluted Object.prototype.

vuln_skills.name: Prototype Pollution Advanced
vuln_skills.description: Advanced prototype pollution playbook — server-side RCE, client-side gadgets, filter bypasses, and detection techniques. Companion to prototype-pollution basics. Use when you've confirmed pollution and need to escalate to code execution.

vuln_skills.name: DNS Rebinding Attacks
vuln_skills.description: DNS rebinding attack playbook. Use when testing applications that trust DNS resolution for origin checks, interact with internal services from browser context, or when SSRF is not possible server-side but the target has client-side fetch/XHR to attacker-controlled domains.

vuln_skills.name: Subdomain Takeover
vuln_skills.description: Subdomain takeover detection and exploitation playbook. Use when targets have dangling CNAME/NS/MX records pointing to deprovisioned cloud resources, expired third-party services, or unclaimed SaaS tenants.

vuln_skills.name: Privilege Escalation (PEASS-ng)
vuln_skills.description: PEASS-ng privilege escalation. Use after getting a shell — linpeas.sh (Linux) or winpeas.exe (Windows) for automated enumeration of misconfigurations, SUID, cron, capabilities, service permissions, and more.

vuln_skills.name: SSTI Automated Exploitation (SSTImap)
vuln_skills.description: SSTImap automated SSTI detection and exploitation. Use when template expressions or server-side rendering may evaluate attacker-controlled content. Complements the existing ssti-server-side-template-injection skill with automated tooling.

vuln_skills.name: WAF Bypass Techniques
vuln_skills.description: WAF bypass methodology and generic evasion techniques. Use when a web application firewall blocks injection payloads (SQLi, XSS, RCE) and you need to craft bypasses using encoding, protocol-level tricks, or WAF-specific weaknesses.

vuln_skills.name: 401/403 Bypass Techniques
vuln_skills.description: 401/403 bypass playbook. Use when encountering access-denied responses on admin panels, API endpoints, or restricted paths. Covers path manipulation, HTTP method tampering, header injection, protocol downgrade, and automated bypass tools.
